title: Tax Analyst
description: PepsiCo is the world's leading food and beverage company with $91B in net revenue and operations in 200+ countries. As a Tax Analyst, you'll ensure compliance and optimize our global tax position.
responsibilities: Prepare and review tax compliance filings across multiple jurisdictions
Analyze tax implications of corporate transactions and restructurings
Maintain tax provision calculations and support external audits
Research tax law changes and assess impact on company strategy
Work with business units to identify tax planning opportunities
Document tax positions and maintain supporting schedules

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years of tax preparation or tax compliance experience

benefits: Paid vacation, holidays, and personal days
